body.title: agent_datacenter: master logging control center — hierarchical datacenter_logs layout
body.result: LoggingControlCenter singleton in agent_datacenter/logcontrol/control_center.py. Hierarchy: datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/. RotatingFileHandler 10MB. Renamed from logging/ to logcontrol/ to avoid stdlib shadow. IgorBase integration deferred to Phase 2 T-adc-base-class-extract (same file touch).
body.description:
Implement the master logging control center with a hierarchical log layout rooted at datacenter_logs/. All devices route log records here.

Design decision (Akien 2026-04-27): Logs by default should make sense relative to the datacenter. datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/... — so datacenter_logs/igor/cognition/, datacenter_logs/postgres/, etc.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/logging/control_center.py:
  class LoggingControlCenter:
    _root: Path  # datacenter_logs/ dir (set by agentctl init or caller)
    def get_logger(self, device_id: str, subsystem: str | None = None) -> logging.Logger:
      # Logger name: {device_id}.{subsystem} if subsystem else device_id
      # Log file: datacenter_logs/{device_id}/{subsystem}/{device_id}.log or datacenter_logs/{device_id}/{device_id}.log
      # Creates dirs as needed
      # Returns Python logger with RotatingFileHandler (max 10MB, 5 backups)
  def configure_root(datacenter_logs_path: Path) -> None: sets _root on the singleton
  Singleton: LoggingControlCenter.instance() returns the configured instance
- Integration: IgorBase.log property uses LoggingControlCenter.instance().get_logger(device_id='igor', subsystem=module_name)
- Igor subsystem example: datacenter_logs/igor/cognition/cognition.log, datacenter_logs/igor/memory/memory.log

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/logging/control_center.py
- ~/TheIgors/wild_igor/igor/igor_base.py (update log property to use LoggingControlCenter)

Design rules:
- oop-first: LoggingControlCenter class with get_logger method; not a module-level configure function
- docs-in-code: module docstring shows the datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ layout with an example tree

Scope boundary:
IN: LoggingControlCenter, hierarchical log path resolution, RotatingFileHandler, IgorBase integration
OUT: log shipping, centralized log aggregation (that's a future ticket)

Test plan:
- get_logger('igor', 'cognition') returns a logger whose records go to datacenter_logs/igor/cognition/igor.log
- get_logger('postgres') returns a logger writing to datacenter_logs/postgres/postgres.log
- Dirs created automatically if they don't exist
- IgorBase.log routes through LoggingControlCenter after the integration
